features: 【Xmas Wrapping Paper】Include one roll 15m christmas wrapping paper,measures 44cm*15m/ 17in*49ft, sufficient quantities suitable for packing Christmas gifts of samll medium.
【Xmas Design】Kraft christmas wrapping paper printed with white xmas pine branches flowers berries,vintage and simple xmas style will make your christmas gifts exquisite and christmassy!
【High Quality】Brown christmas wrapping paper made of 90g kraft paper,thick durable,100% recyclable and ECO friendly,roll packing easy to use and keep.
【Widely Application】Brown kraft wrapping paper is perfect for Christmas Eve,New Year, winter birthdays,winter holidays and parties,great gift wrapping paper for kids adults,men,women.
